review_title: Hybridizing consumer behavioural approaches on agrifood markets: Attitudes, judgements and choices
author: Langat K.
pros: Review of articles faster and with clarity of content . this gives value or money and time.
cons: All is well organized and spent less time to review a kournal
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The idea is audacious but it's not for everyone
description: The product's value proposition is good. Employing AI along with a good platform to do knowledge analysis and synthesis is a good idea. I discovered the product this year and did a trial of it to see if it would pay to add it to my scientific production toolbox and I came to the conclusion that it wasn't for ME.
author: Bruno C.
pros: The product's value proposition is excellent. Undoubtedly a breakthrough for the knowledge management industry. The AI really works. The interface is beautiful, easy to use, easy to learn. It has good value for money.
cons: Although I understand that it is useful for a lot of people, for my way of working it didn't. I prefer to have all records of my work as a researcher in notes in files with the purest possible format, in the case of markdown.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Steven N.
pros: Hi, I canceled my GENEI .IO purchase within three days, while many days were left in the trial period. The amount that has been charged is $ 263.88 on 3/18/22 for a year plan but the refund did not reflect in my bank account after almost a month. I think the site is fake.
cons: Hi, I canceled my GENEI .IO purchase within three days, while many days were left in the trial period. The amount that has been charged is $ 263.88 on 3/18/22 for a year plan but the refund did not reflect in my bank account after almost a month. I think the site is fake.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Louis J.
pros: I absolutely love this research summarization and aggregation tool! It's like having VSCode for essay-writing. It makes the research and organization process so much easier and more efficient. The ability to quickly and easily gather and organize all of my sources in one place is a game-changer. The tool's interface is intuitive and user-friendly, making it easy to navigate and find exactly what I need. The summaries provided are also incredibly helpful in understanding the main points of my sources. I highly recommend this tool to any student or researcher looking to streamline their work and improve their productivity. It's an essential tool for anyone working on an essay or research project.
cons: I am looking forward to seeing how Genei could be leverage for B2B use-cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Supremely easy navigation and cuts down my reading time significantly, giving me concise chunks of relevant information
cons: The time taken to provide an overview could be shortened
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Honestly it has been revolutionary for me. Being able to have key notes on demand from a library which I’ve previously read is not a novelty that will wear off anytime soon. Customer service has been amazing, and I sense it’s a company that truly listens to its customers. Overall - excellent.
author: Sam B.
pros: Honestly, the software is great. It’s accurate and will only improve upon this. I’m now able to get excellent summations of previously read articles, which I can export to word for more complete filing. Also, there’s a search function within the software that allows for a quick reference, and I have been told they are adding a citation function which will be a tremendous additional feature.
cons: I haven’t found myself using the notation feature all that much. Typically I tend to read first whilst taking notes on word, and then upload to genei afterwards for completeness. This may alter as the software develops.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Save a LOT of time and Effort
author: Alejandro G.
pros: You can rely on Genei to help you find the most important parts of any document or article. It is algorithm is really effective.
cons: I would like another language added such as spanish.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great visibility and access to sophisticated papers
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It helps pick out the details most pertinent to my investigations, and allows me to quickly read papers beyond just looking at the abstract
cons: I am keen to Genei to start telling me analytics on my own usage that would help me read faster
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I wish Genei was around when I was a student. It would have made my life so much easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Genei's summarizer is really good at identifying the key points of each section of an article. I placed a 50+ page academic article in it and it summarized it so well that I was able to get all the key points of the whole article in just 5 minutes.
cons: Genei is not good at handling content that is more than 100 pages in length yet. This limitation means that I can't use it to summarize some ebooks and other longer content that I want to summarize quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive, I will be paying for a subscription once my trial is over.
author: Yannis F.
pros: Its the best tool for research I have found so far. The summary function gives a deeper insight than an abstract, and has saved me time realising a journal article isnt quite what I am looking for. The summary function also provides a good reminder if you want to quickly review a document. I find it invaluable and will be using it frequently.
cons: The highlight function for text can be a little clunky, but better than other apps I have tried.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Stas S.
pros: Genei are amazing - they changed my life at university helping to make my essays top quality
cons: i had no issues - on the contrary, the tech is amazing
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Peter C.
pros: It made research very easy, I didn’t haven’t to read as much
cons: The colour scheme could definitely be improved
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Super helpful app for my MBA
description: I have been using it to help summarise journals and articles to help streamline my studies for an MBA and I use it religiously. So good!
author: James C.
pros: It is super easy to use, very user friendly and makes my studies so much more efficient
cons: Sometimes the PDFs aren't readable, but Genei then link you to a way to solve that problem which is awesome
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lee-Ann S.
pros: It saves me so much time on my extra reading! The summaries are very accurate and helps me understand the material better
cons: I wish I could export multiple papers into a single word document rather than have them seperate! Also to have the authors name ontop of the exported word document as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mohammed D.
pros: AI is changing the face of our planet and Genei is at the forefront of that change. Has saved me so much time at work.
cons: Sometimes it can feel a little clunky, but very rare.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lucas K.
pros: Genei makes reading articles and finding the key information so much easier. It makes my work much more efficient, freeing up time for better writing and analysis.
cons: Genei does exactly what it says it does. I haven't found anything that I don't like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: seems like a great product and has definitely improved my workflow.
author: Louis T.
pros: I love how much this software saves me time
cons: It can be a bit buggy but they're fixing the bugs quickly!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I love genei - it helps me read only relevant articles and answer my research questions
author: Alice S.
pros: This product has been *so* helpful when I need to research and write essays. I get through articles so much quicker and can instantly see which parts are relevant. I waste a lot less time scanning through irrelevant documents. It is also quite easy to use and I love all the features they are brining out.
cons: Nothing I really dislike but it would be sick if they could add a citation manager to their software. I've found the developers are very receptive to user feedback, so maybe this is coming!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Genei has been great! I like the free trial and am was so happy to find out they offer a student discount.
author: Lindsay C.
pros: This system is easy to use, efficient and very affordable on a student budget. With additional readings being assigned due to COVID moving classes online this program is a lifesaver for keeping me on top of the readings.
cons: Some document formats aren't compatible - perhaps this is a user error though as I have only had one or two documents that no summary could be generated for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I really like the feel of the company, I've actually found some of their blog posts to be entertaining and fun reads, I hope that they continue to turn into more of a general study-skills service.
author: Richard R.
pros: I love its ability to read PDFs and scan multiple documents, the semantic search tool helps me quickly find what I'm looking for. The user interface is intuitive and it did not take long to understand.
cons: confusing name to pronounce when telling people about the software! Seriously though, I've had no issues yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Massively helped my efficiency and workflow!
description: Thanks Genei! Really like the software and think it has transformed the way I work
author: Oli N.
pros: Has really helped me streamline my work days during my postgraduate study, meaning I can spend less time wading through unnecessary reading hours and spend more time focusing in on the areas I need to research.
cons: There aren't many! And it's still early days, so I'm confident that Genei will continue to just get more and more useful for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tamara O.
pros: I'm a nursing student in a senior level so I've been writing papers non-stop every week this year, I wish i discovered sooner, because it has literally changed my life and saved me soo so much time researching articles. I absolutely love the summary feature because it is more extensive than an abstract
cons: sometimes the summary is not as detailed as i would like and repeats information
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Genei has proven a valuable tool for storing and adding notes to papers, with easy succinct summaries of the key points.
author: Joshua N.
pros: Genei helps distil the important information from papers to form a perfect hybrid of a paper's abstract and the full text. It helps speed up reading and has increased productivity immensely.
cons: Sometimes the software does not work with papers from some journals in my field, however this is a small proportion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Don't write anything without Genei these days!
author: Samuel H.
pros: It's easy to use, and gets me exactly what i need from long bodies of text. Don't summarise anything without it these days!
cons: The main features that could be improved for me are including important equations and data
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Natasha M.
pros: Has really helped cut down my research time - the automatic summarisation is excellent and the scanning/PDF capabilities are very useful
cons: Could be cheaper but given quality of product this isn't a major concern
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
